response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with a strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some Java/C++) and notable prior IDE-adjacent work on NI LabWindows/CVI. However, the role requires deep JVM expertise plus Spring and Kotlin proficiency, none of which are demonstrated in the resume. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, device orchestration) years ago, with no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or modern JVM tooling experience. The mismatch on core required qualifications is too large for a mid-senior IC role expected to own JVM/enterprise framework subsystems.
strengths: Prior IDE development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Senior-level track record at high-bar engineering orgs (Stripe, Shopify)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, testing tools, CI/CD, large-scale systems
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
No Kotlin experience and only limited, dated Java work
Career focus is web/full-stack and DLang, not JVM internals or language tooling

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering maturity and large-scale systems track record
